name: Grilled Tenderloin Salad with Honey-Mustard D
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Thinly sliced purple onion, separated into rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first three ingredients in a small bowl.
2. Trim fat from pork and brush honey mixture over pork.
3. Coat barbecue grill rack with cooking spray and place on grill over medium-hot coals or heat.
4. Place pork on rack and cook 18 minutes or until meat thermometer registers 160 degrees, turning pork occasionally.
5. Cut into 1/4 inch thick slices and set aside.
6. Combine salad dressing ingredients in a container of an electric blender; cover and process until smooth.
7. Divide pork, lettuces, pineapple, onion, and cantaloupe evenly among 6 serving plates.
8. Top each salad with 2 tablespoons almonds.
9. Serve each with 2 1/2 tablespoons dressing.
